title: doc-comment syntax (/// or doc "")
manager: Doc-comment syntax — `///` or `doc "..."` — so a machine's states, transitions, and vals can carry documentation right in the source; grammar-level in this tier, with extraction coming in the docs era. This is the hook that later lets FSL generate reference docs from a machine the way TypeDoc does from code. Here it is just the syntax, reserved now so authors can start writing docs and a later release doesn't have to break to add it.
cs: doc-comment syntax (`///` or `doc ""`) — grammar only in this tier; extraction/rendering is the era-2 docs-extraction artifact (W7.37); reserving the syntax now avoids a later breaking add.
